app_release_notes: v0.16.19 - Start a New Load now actually starts clean. The previous version left stale CSVs in your import folders, which would silently re-import into the new workbook and make the Seating Depth Log look like the last load's data carried over. Now: starting a new load always archives every CSV in your import folders into a dated subfolder, plus carries your Load Library across so saved winners stay searchable across loads (matches the marketing promise). Setup carry-over (rifle/optic/cartridge/etc) works the same as before. Also refreshes the welcome-tour screenshots that were stale or captured with a macOS notification overlay.
